project_type: AWS Solutions Library product - monorepo with multiple packages (lambdas, infrastructure CDK, frontend React, shared commons)
build_system: npm workspaces with vitest for tests, CDK for infrastructure, esbuild for Lambda bundling
test_framework: vitest with aws-sdk-client-mock for AWS SDK mocking, vitest-mock-extended, generateSchemaData for test data from Zod schemas
verification_instructions: 1. Run `npm run build` to typecheck all workspaces. 2. Run `npm test` to run all vitest tests with coverage. 3. Run `npm run test:update-snapshots` if CDK infrastructure changes are made.
snapshot_or_generated_files: CDK snapshot tests in source/infrastructure/test/ - regenerate with `npm run test:update-snapshots`
setup_instructions: 1. `npm install` to install all workspace dependencies
environment_constraints: No Docker daemon available. No external AWS deployment possible. Validation via typecheck and unit tests only.
contribution_requirements: Apache-2.0 license header on all .ts/.tsx files. Prettier enforced with @amzn/* imports before relative imports. Bump *SchemaVersion constants when schemas change. Use Zod for validation. JSend response format for API. Middy middleware for Lambda handlers. Custom error hierarchy for domain errors. EventBridge events for async cross-service workflows.
key_patterns: 1. Lease lifecycle managed by InnovationSandbox class (static facade). 2. Events defined in source/common/events/ with EventDetailTypes enum. 3. Email notifications via email-service.ts with EmailTemplates namespace and SubscribedEmailEvents array. 4. API routes via Middy httpRouterHandler in leases-handler.ts. 5. CDK API resources in source/infrastructure/lib/components/api/leases-api.ts. 6. Frontend uses React Hook Form + Zod validation + Cloudscape components + React Query hooks. 7. Global config validates max duration via validateLeaseCompliesWithGlobalConfig(). 8. LeaseStore uses DynamoDB with optimistic concurrency.
directory_structure: source/common - shared models, schemas, services, events. source/lambdas/api/leases - lease API Lambda handler. source/infrastructure/lib/components/api - CDK API definitions. source/frontend/src/domains/leases - frontend lease pages/components/hooks/services.
